name: Slaughtra
short_description: Slaughtra is a arcade styled top-down horde shooter where you face off against an ever growing onslaught of enemies seeking nothing but to end you. Fight your way through and maybe somehow you'll find your way out of this nightmare...
detailed_description:
Slaughtra is an arcade styled top-down shooter where you face off endless hordes of enemies on the surface of the planet known as Slaughtra.

The game is very simple and akin to what you would encounter on an arcade machine; quick runs with score in focus and simple controls, perfect for when you have a small amount of downtime and just want some quick action!

You can play as three different characters, each with their own set of weapons and perks which garners more power as you rack up more kills, and you'll need it as the more you kill, the more of them come!

How long can you survive against the endless tide? Well, that's what they're sending you down to find out...
